# Innovat Bharat

> Innovat Bharat builds premier institute-like ecosystems inside rural and tier-3 colleges across India — providing structured learning journeys, real internships, mentorship, and entrepreneurial thinking from the first year of college.

## About

Innovat Bharat was founded by Mahesh Chillakuru (Jagriti Yatra Fellow, IIT Mandi network, 8+ years SaaS sales & business development). The initiative addresses a core problem: students in rural and tier-3 colleges graduate with degrees but without the skills, confidence, or direction needed for today's world.

We don't replace formal education. We enhance it by building a parallel ecosystem on campus — combining mindset development, industry exposure, paid internships, startup culture, and community mentorship from year one.

## Core Programs

- **Campus Ecosystem Program** — Year-round parallel ecosystem inside your college
- **Foundation & Mindset Series** — For first-year students: clarity, direction, entrepreneurial thinking
- **Earn-While-You-Learn Internship Pathways** — Paid internships (~₹10,000/month) from second year onwards
- **Startup & Innovation Labs** — Student teams ideating and building ventures with mentorship
- **Domain Expert & Industry Connect Series** — Monthly expert sessions, field visits, domain workshops

## Who We Help

- **Students** — Career clarity, real internships, entrepreneurial skills, confidence
- **Parents** — Real employability, reduced extra-course costs, transparent outcomes
- **Colleges** — Reputation beyond placements, stronger ecosystem, better student outcomes
- **Industry** — Job-ready talent, internship pipeline, CSR partnership opportunities
